Name:  Brown, Andrea                      Unit No:  0f46f229-1d9b-4682-d447-7e4d10dd36bc

Admission Date:  1971-02-27     Discharge Date:  1989-02-25

Date of Birth:   1999-11-14     Sex:  M

Service:

Patient is being discharged on 1987-08-19 to home.  The patient
had drainage around his sternal incision site which slowly
decreased.  The patient had no white count and his last white
count was 7.2.  He did not have a temperature.  The patient
was ambulating, doing well, and his discharge, slowly
decreased Betadine and his dressings were applied in the
hospital until discharge had stopped.  The patient is
discharged to home in stable condition.

There is no changes in his prescriptions.  His medications
include nicotine 14 mg q day, Lasix 20 mg po bid, Imdur 60 mg
po q day, Fentanyl patch 50 mcg/hour TP q72 hours, Quinine
sulfate 520 mg po q hs, Glipizide XL 50 mg po q day,
Neurontin 300 mg po q day, Percocet 1-2 tablets po q4 hours
prn, EC-ASA 325 mg po q day, Zantac 150 mg po bid, Lopressor
25 mg po bid, Colace 100 mg po bid, Joseph Gray 20 mEq po bid.

The patient is discharged to home in stable condition.
